page_metadata.biotools__summary: Viola is a flexible and powerful python package designed specifically for analysis of genomic structural variant (SV) signatures. We provide following tools for SV signature analysis: Custom SV classification tool, Feature matrix generator, and SV signature extractor (NMF) with stability evaluation system.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Viola is a flexible and powerful python package designed specifically for analysis of genomic structural variant (SV) signatures. We provide following tools for SV signature analysis: Custom SV classification tool, Feature matrix generator, and SV signature extractor (NMF) with stability evaluation system.
